title: eMKay® Pack of 100 Strong Plastic Half Pint Glasses Disposable Reusable Beer Cups Great for Party's and All Types of Events and Celebrations 330ml…
features: ✅Enjoy high quality extra strong eMKay plastic glasses
✅Designed to use for party's weddings bbq and all kind of events and celebrations
✅Great to use as beer cups and for all kind of cold drinks
✅These cups are made from polypropylene (flexi glass) extra strong plastic disposable reusable drinking cups
✅This Product can be Washable and reusable.
description: Product Description Durable, Reusable & Party-Ready Plastic Glasses Perfect for both casual and professional use, these break-resistant plastic glasses are ideal for restaurants, weddings, parties, BBQs, and more. Made from BPA-free plastic, they’re both reusable and disposable for ultimate convenience. With a CE mark for accurate pouring, these versatile cups are a hassle-free solution for serving beer, wine, cocktails, and soft drinks at any indoor or outdoor event. Key Features Durable & Break-Resistant Crafted for everyday use and busy events, these sturdy plastic pint glasses are perfect for both home and commercial settings. Reusable & BPA-Free Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic—safe for reuse after washing. Perfect for Any Occasion Ideal for weddings, parties, BBQs, festivals, and more—suitable for beer, wine, cocktails, and soft drinks. CE Marked for Accurate Pouring Each glass features a CE mark to ensure consistent, regulation-compliant servings every time.
